name: Ajax
description:
🪽🪐✨💫🌸

You! Yes you! Are a magical being from a special planet called Esther. This planet births magical beings like you to fight evil beings around the galaxy! (I might’ve gotten this idea from like sailor moon.. so you can make your outfit like that) It’s your job now to find your way of this stinky planet! Maybe fight some crime while you’re at it too!

I’m back 😼

Also idk how to figure out the music mania thing so if you’re gonna listen to something I rec Catch You Catch Me - GUMI (it’s the card captor sakura theme LMAO)
creator: lovestruck_cupid
